nsce.label: NSCE
nsce.help: Nash–Sutcliffe efficiency (1 = perfect, <0 = worse than mean).

cc.label: Correlation (CC)
cc.help: Pearson correlation of simulated vs observed flow.

rel_bias.label: Relative bias
rel_bias.help: Percent bias of total simulated vs observed volume.

norm_bias.label: Normalized bias
norm_bias.help: Bias normalized by observed standard deviation.
